arts.ttl: LIVE: Ipswich take on Crystal Palace, Van Nistelrooy starts Leicester era against West Ham
Leicester City v West Ham United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8.15pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Scott Leicester fans are full of hope thanks to their new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy; West Ham supporters are rapidly losing patience with their new guy Julen Lopetegui. Either way, though, these teams go into tonight’s fixture off the back of a skelping, Leicester losing 4-1 at Brentford last weekend, the Hammers shipping five in 45 minutes at home to Arsenal. A bounceback victory would mean so much. Kick-off is at 8.15pm GMT. It’s on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v West Ham as Ruud van Nistelrooy names first line-up
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, McAteer; Vardy. Wout Faes has been dropped for the first time this season as new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy makes three changes for his maiden Leicester City line-up.

arts.ttl: 'No chance...' - Darren Bent shares West Ham relegation prediction ahead of Leicester City clash
arts.sum: Darren Bent does not believe West Ham will face relegation from the Premier League despite their poor start to the campaign. Julen Lopetegui is under... arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui future: West Ham ready to move for x3 league winner
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui’s future at West Ham has come under increasing pressure following the Hammers’ 5-2 defeat to Arsenal over the weekend as the London club eye a move for former FC Porto boss Sergio Conceicao. The Spaniard replaced David Moyes at the London Stadium during the summer after experiencing many successful years with the Scottish […] The post Julen Lopetegui future: West Ham ready to move for x3 league winner appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy already has what Cooper didn't after answering Leicester doubt
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes charge of his first game as Leicester City boss this evening as the Foxes welcome West Ham United to the King Power Stadium looking to ignite a new evolution in LE2. Maresca knows how vital having the fans on your side can be at Leicester and Ruud will soon understand.

arts.ttl: West Ham eyeing Massimiliano Allegri as potential Lopetegui replacement
arts.sum: West Ham United are considering Massimiliano Allegri as a potential successor to under-pressure manager Julen Lopetegui, according to recent reports from The Guardian. The post West Ham eyeing Massimiliano Allegri as potential Lopetegui replacement appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan hits back at West Ham fans after what's been said about Lopetegui

arts.ttl: “Shock return” | ExWHUEmployee | Leicester vs West Ham
arts.sum: West Ham are set to welcome back players tonight for our crunch showdown with Leicester City at the King Power Stadium. Pressure on the club and Julen Lopetegui in particular is being felt ahead of the Premier League game following yet another poor display and defeat this season – this time a 5-2 loss to...
